---
title: "CLI and MCP"
description: "How terminal and agent workflows use DraftStack."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

The CLI uses the same hosted API as the dashboard.

The MCP server is API-backed, so agents can list projects, inspect suggestions, view diffs, approve, and dismiss with scoped tokens.

Use JSON output for scripts and agent workflows.
